exchanges.user: ہلو کیا بولو ہلو کیسا بولو ہلو ہلو کو جواب دیں ہائے چیٹ when will i get married جواب دے گا
exchanges.oracle: Haye, tumhari shaadi ka samay zyada der tak chup nahi rahega — yeh Rahu period me aata hua rishta pehle ajeeb, unexpected, ya thoda late feel ho sakta hai, par strong bandhan ka yog bana raha hai. Abhi jo energy chal rahi hai, usme attraction, networking, dosti se rishta, ya kaam/online connection se proposal aane ke chances badh rahe hain. Mera andaza hai ki 2026 ke end se 2028 ke beech marriage ke liye sabse zyada movement dikh raha hai, especially jab commitment clear hoti hai. Spouse ka natu

exchanges.user: हाई चैट, वोड बिजनस शुड़ आई डू? हाई चैट, वोड बिजनस शुड़ आई डू?
exchanges.oracle: Tumhare chart mein business ka raasta sharp mind aur network se khulta hai—communication, consulting, digital media, sales, trading, marketing, tech-enabled service, ya partnerships wale kaam tumhare liye zyada jeevit hain. Rahu-Gemini aur Venus-Aquarius ka yog batata hai ki naya, modern, online, foreign, ya community-based business tumhe pull karega; bas ek hi cheez, over-idea mat bano, execution ko roz ka ritual banao. Taurus mein Jupiter-Saturn dhan ko dhire par pakka banate hain, isliye luxu
